Hero.headline: Transforming Spaces Into Timeless Experiences
Hero.subheading1: High-End Interior Fit-Out & Retail Space Design

About.title: About Zawaya International
About.p1: Zawaya International is a specialized interior fit-out contractor delivering premium design and finishing solutions for commercial and hospitality spaces. We collaborate closely with brands and businesses to transform concepts into visually striking environments that enhance customer experience and elevate brand identity.
About.p2: Our expertise covers design development, project management, interior construction, and high-end finishing works.

Services.title: Our Expertise
Services.subtitle: Comprehensive fit-out solutions tailored for luxury and commercial environments.
Services.s1_desc: Complete interior construction and finishing services for commercial spaces including structural works, partitions, ceilings, lighting systems, and custom installations.
Services.s2_desc: Designing attractive retail environments that enhance customer experience and strengthen brand identity.
Services.s3_desc: Creating immersive and luxurious atmospheres for hotels, restaurants, and lounges.
Services.s4_desc: End-to-end project supervision ensuring quality execution and on-time delivery.

Process.title: Our Work Process
Process.subtitle: A structured approach from concept to reality.
Process.step1_desc: We understand your brand, space requirements, and project goals.
Process.step2_desc: Our design team develops layouts and visual concepts.
Process.step3_desc: Our technical team manages construction and interior works.
Process.step4_desc: We deliver the completed space ready for operation.

WhyUs.title: Why Choose Zawaya
WhyUs.f1_desc: Highly skilled architects, designers, and engineers.
WhyUs.f2_desc: We use high-quality materials and finishing solutions.
WhyUs.f3_desc: Efficient project planning and timely completion.
WhyUs.f4_desc: Every project is customized to meet client needs.

Testimonials.title: Client Testimonials
Testimonials.t1_text: Zawaya International delivered our retail store exactly as envisioned. Their attention to detail and execution quality exceeded expectations.
Testimonials.t2_text: A professional team that respects timelines and delivers exceptional luxury finishes.

CTA.title: Start Your Project With Us
CTA.subtitle: Let's transform your vision into a remarkable space.

About.title: About Zawaya
About.subtitle: Crafting Exceptional Interior Spaces
About.p1: Zawaya International is a professional interior fit-out contractor specializing in commercial interiors, retail environments, hospitality spaces, and high-end finishing works.
About.p2: We believe that the best spaces are built on a foundation of collaboration, trust, and a shared vision. Our experienced team of architects, designers, and craftsmen work closely with clients to deliver environments that inspire and engage.
About.p3: With over 15 years of industry experience, we ensure that every project is completed to the highest standards of quality, on time and within budget.

SingleProject.overviewDesc: A complete interior fit-out transformation focusing on premium materials, bespoke lighting, and an optimal flow to enhance the space experience. We managed the entire process from conceptual detailing to the final luxury finishing.
